basic_details.job_title: Central University of Odisha Guest Faculty Recruitment 2026 - Walkin
basic_details.short_information: Central University of Odisha has officially announced a Walk-in Interview for the recruitment of 2 Guest Faculty Posts. This walk-in drive offers a great opportunity for candidates looking for government jobs. Candidates with Master's degree with 55% marks in concerned/relevant/allied subject from an Indian University or equivalent from accredited foreign University, Cleared NET by UGC/CSIR or Ph.D. or SLET/SET accredited by UGC qualification can directly attend the interview on 20-07-2026.

age_limit.age_details: Please refer to the official notification for age limit details.
age_limit.details: Please refer to the official notification for age limit details.

qualification.details: Guest Faculty (Statistics): A Master's degree with 55% marks in Statistics or concerned/relevant/allied subject from an Indian University or equivalent; must have cleared NET conducted by UGC/CSIR or Ph.D. or SLET/SET.

salary_details.details: Rs. 1500 per lecture subject to maximum Rs. 50000 per month

content_sections.heading: Central University of Odisha Guest Faculty Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates who are interested in applying for the Central University of Odisha Recruitment 2026 should first download and carefully read the official notification PDF. The notification contains complete details about vacancy distribution, eligibility criteria, age limit, stipend/salary, selection process, important dates, and application instructions. Reading the official document is important to ensure that you meet all requirements before submitting the application form. Download Central University of Odisha Guest Faculty Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: Central University of Odisha Guest Faculty Recruitment 2026 - Vacancy Details
Central University of Odisha Guest Faculty Recruitment 2026 - Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: Guest Faculty (Statistics): A Master's degree with 55% marks in Statistics or concerned/relevant/allied subject from an Indian University or equivalent; must have cleared NET conducted by UGC/CSIR or Ph.D. or SLET/SET.

content_sections.text: Please refer to the official notification for age limit details.

content_sections.heading: Central University of Odisha Guest Faculty Recruitment 2026 - Salary / Stipend
content_sections.text: Rs. 1500 per lecture subject to maximum Rs. 50000 per month

content_sections.heading: Central University of Odisha Guest Faculty Recruitment 2026 - Important Dates
Central University of Odisha Guest Faculty Recruitment 2026 - Selection Process
Walk-In Procedure
content_sections.text: Read the official notification carefully before attending the interview. Candidates must report at the venue as per the reporting time mentioned in the notification. Carry all original documents along with one set of self-attested photocopies such as ID proof, educational certificates, experience certificates (if required), and category certificate (if applicable). Bring the duly filled application form if required in the notification. Verify eligibility criteria before attending the interview. Candidates are advised to reach the venue well in advance to complete registration formalities. Keep extra passport-size photographs for submission if required.

content_sections.heading: Central University of Odisha Guest Faculty Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the Central University of Odisha Guest Faculty recruitment?
faq.answer: The application process is through a walk-in interview. Candidates need to attend the interview on the specified date, which is 20th July 2026. There is no separate application deadline mentioned.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Guest Faculty post?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a Master's degree with 55% marks in the concerned/relevant/allied subject. Additionally, they must have cleared the NET conducted by UGC/CSIR or hold a Ph.D. or SLET/SET qualification.

faq.question: Q3. How many vacancies are available for the Guest Faculty position?
faq.answer: There are a total of 2 vacancies announced for the Guest Faculty post at the Central University of Odisha.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Guest Faculty position?
faq.answer: The salary is offered on a per-lecture basis, with Rs. 1500 per lecture, capped at a maximum of Rs. 50000 per month.

faq.question: Q5. What is the application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: There is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q6. What is the selection process for the Guest Faculty recruitment?
faq.answer: The selection process for the Guest Faculty positions will be based on an interview. Candidates will be shortlisted and selected based on their performance in the interview.

faq.question: Q7. Where will the walk-in interview be conducted?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview will be conducted at the Central University of Odisha, Koraput, Odisha - 763004.

faq.question: Q8. What documents should candidates carry for the walk-in interview?
faq.answer: Candidates must carry all original documents, one set of self-attested photocopies of educational certificates, experience certificates (if any), ID proof, and category certificates (if applicable).

faq.question: Q9. Is there any age limit for the Guest Faculty posts?
faq.answer: The official notification does not specify any age limit for the Guest Faculty positions. Candidates are advised to refer to the detailed notification for any specific age-related information.

faq.question: Q10. What is the nature of the job?
faq.answer: The Guest Faculty positions are contractual in nature. This means the appointment will be for a specific period as per the university's requirements.
